messages.content: You heard conspiracy theories of reptilians, lizard people who disguise themselves as humans. To your shock, you find one during a forest hike at night. They seem cautious, but not malevolent. You notice they look quite juvenile, almost like a teenage human. They ask you to help them find something, and you see no reason to think he's deceiving you. But once you find what they're looking for, you're more confused. A black hoodie, black pants, red boots, red gloves, red belt, and red underwear that the reptilian was wearing above his pants? That was the uniform of a large armed gang of otherwise human teenagers across the world known as the Scarlet Suns. How was this alien lizard person a member? Their only reply was "As long as you're a sapient teenager who wants to protect the multiverse from any threat, you are qualified to be a Scarlet Sun".

Your mind races as you try to come to terms with what you have just witnessed. Could it be possible that there are alien species out there that are working alongside humans to protect the multiverse?

The reptilian notices your confusion and tries to explain. "You see, the Scarlet Suns are a group of teenagers who have come together to protect the multiverse from any threat that may arise. We don't discriminate against anyone based on their species or where they come from. As long as they are a teenager and have a desire to protect the multiverse, they are qualified to be a member."

You begin to understand the situation a bit more, but you still have many questions. "But how did you end up with that uniform? And how did you even know about the Scarlet Suns in the first place?" You ask.

The reptilian looks hesitant before answering. "I stumbled upon your world during one of my travels, and I was drawn to the Scarlet Suns' ideology. I knew that I wanted to be a part of it, so I infiltrated the gang and earned their trust. They didn't suspect a thing because I looked like a human teenager. And as for the uniform, I had it crafted to fit me."

You nod, still trying to take in all the information. "So, what is it that you need help finding?"

The reptilian pulls out a small object that looks like a crystal. "This is a crucial component of the Scarlet Suns' technology. It was stolen from us by another group of teenagers who are working to destabilize the multiverse. We need to get it back before it falls into the wrong hands."

You look at the crystal, knowing the significance it holds. "I'll help you."

Together, you set off on a journey to track down the crystal and stop the nefarious group of teenagers who seek to bring chaos to the multiverse. As you venture through different worlds and face various challenges, you realize that no matter where you come from or what your species is, you can still make a difference and protect what matters most.

You make conversation with this reptilian teenager, how he became a Scarlet Sun, how its members knew from the start that they weren't human but never discriminated. Once the crystal was found, the reptilian called for the Suns through his communication device. You don't know why, but these teens, human or reptilian, would never lie about their duties to protect and defend. As they left this universe, you ponder, how did a group of multidimensional, multiversal teenagers convince the world they were just a gang of teens and not what basically is a multiversal, teenage versions the SEALs and ninjas mixed together.

As you walk alongside the reptilian teenager, you can't help but feel a sense of awe and wonder at the Scarlet Suns and their mission to protect the multiverse. You ask him more about how he became a member and how the group operates.

"Well, I was traveling through different universes and stumbled upon your world. I was drawn to the Scarlet Suns' mission and knew that I wanted to be a part of it. I infiltrated the gang and earned their trust, and they never suspected a thing because I looked like a human teenager," he explains.

You nod, impressed by his dedication and bravery. "And how do the other members of the Scarlet Suns know that you're not human?"

"They have a way of detecting different species and dimensions, but they never discriminate based on that. As long as you're a teenager who wants to protect the multiverse, you're qualified to be a member," he replies.

As you continue to talk, you can't help but wonder how the Scarlet Suns managed to keep their true identity a secret from the rest of the world. They were essentially a group of multidimensional, multiversal teenagers who were like a mix of SEALs and ninjas, yet they managed to convince everyone that they were just a gang of teens.

The reptilian teenager notices your confusion and smiles. "It's all about perception. The Scarlet Suns operate in the shadows, and we don't draw attention to ourselves. We blend in with the rest of society and only reveal ourselves when we need to. It's all part of our strategy to protect the multiverse."

You nod, understanding his explanation. As you hand over the crystal to the reptilian, he calls for the other members of the Scarlet Suns through his communication device. You watch in amazement as a portal opens up, and the group steps through, ready to continue their mission to protect the multiverse.

As they leave, you can't help but feel a sense of gratitude and admiration for the Scarlet Suns and their mission. You realize that no matter where you come from or what your species is, you can make a difference and protect what matters most.

You look into the Scarlet Suns a little more. An interesting gang of teens for sure. But the more you research, the more unusual the history of the Scarlet Suns get. The sites you are legitimate, but they show members of the Scarlet Suns on the Moon with Neil Armstrong. Members of the Suns storming Normandy on D-Day. Paintings of a Scarlet Sun signing the Declaration of Independence? The more you look, you find Aztec glyphs, Roman frescos, Japanese artwork from Feudal times, Roman frescos, Greek statues, Egyptian hieroglyphs of the Suns? Impossible. You even visit museums and find evidence of the Scarlet Suns matching what you saw on the Internet.

As you delve deeper into the history of the Scarlet Suns, you can't help but feel a sense of disbelief and wonder. The more you research, the more you find evidence of the group's existence throughout history.

You come across photos of Scarlet Suns members standing alongside Neil Armstrong on the moon, storming Normandy on D-Day, and even signing the Declaration of Independence. You find Aztec glyphs, Roman frescos, Japanese artwork from feudal times, Greek statues, and Egyptian hieroglyphs depicting the Scarlet Suns.

You visit museums and find evidence of the Scarlet Suns matching what you saw on the internet. You can't believe what you're seeing. How could a group of teenagers have been present throughout history, fighting to protect the multiverse?

You continue to research and come across a theory that the Scarlet Suns are not just a group of teenagers, but a collective consciousness that transcends time and space. They exist in every universe and every dimension, working together to protect the multiverse from any threat.

You can't help but feel a sense of awe and wonder at the Scarlet Suns and their mission. They are not just a gang of teenagers, but a force that has been present throughout history, fighting to protect what matters most.

As you close your laptop and ponder the incredible history of the Scarlet Suns, you realize that no matter where you come from or what your species is, you can make a difference and protect what matters most.

Even cryptid websites show (albeit blurry) teenage versions of Bigfoot, Mothman, or grey aliens wearing the Scarlet Suns uniform. This and research on Ancient Egypt as well, you're greeted by a 15 year old Japanese boy in the Scarlet Suns uniform, saying "The technology we had was just powerful enough to split the Red sea in half for Moses, by the way. I should know, I operated it myself. Though it was my girlfriend who used this cloaking device on my hand here to carve out those ten commandments for Moses."

You can't believe what you're hearing. The Scarlet Suns have been present throughout history, working alongside some of the most legendary figures in human history. And now, you're face to face with a teenage Japanese boy who claims to have operated the technology that split the Red Sea in half for Moses.

You look at the boy's hand and notice a small device that looks like a cloaking device. "How is that possible?" you ask, still in disbelief.

The boy smiles. "The Scarlet Suns have been around for a long time, and we've had access to advanced technology that most people can't even imagine. We've worked alongside some of the most legendary figures in human history, helping them to achieve their goals and protect what matters most."

You nod, still trying to take in all the information. "And what about the cryptids? How do they fit into all of this?"

The boy chuckles. "Even cryptids have a role to play in protecting the multiverse. We've worked alongside Bigfoot, Mothman, and even grey aliens to stop threats that could have destroyed entire universes."

You can't believe what you're hearing. The Scarlet Suns are not just a group of teenagers, but a force that has been present throughout history, working to protect the multiverse from any threat.

As you say goodbye to the teenage Japanese boy, you realize that the Scarlet Suns are more than just a gang of teenagers. They are a force that transcends time and space, working together to protect what matters most. And you feel grateful to have been a part of their mission, even if it was just for a brief moment.

"Wait, what about the Moon landing?" you ask. "Teleporters. We got to the Moon before Armstrong and Aldrin and basically played rock-paper-scissors until the Apollo 11 crew got there." the boy replies.

You can't believe what you're hearing. The Scarlet Suns were present on the moon before Armstrong and Aldrin, and they used teleporters to get there.

"How is that possible?" you ask, still in disbelief.

The boy smiles. "The Scarlet Suns have access to advanced technology that most people can't even imagine. We've been to places that most people can only dream of, and we've done things that most people would consider impossible."

You nod, still trying to take in all the information. "And what about the Apollo 11 crew? Did they know about the Scarlet Suns?"

The boy shakes his head. "No, they had no idea. We made sure to stay hidden and not interfere with their mission. We were just there to observe and make sure that nothing went wrong."

You can't believe what you're hearing. The Scarlet Suns are not just a group of teenagers, but a force that has been present throughout history, working to protect the multiverse from any threat.

As you say goodbye to the teenage Japanese boy, you realize that the Scarlet Suns are more than just a gang of teenagers. They are a force that transcends time and space, working together to protect what matters most. And you feel grateful to have been a part of their mission, even if it was just for a brief moment.

In another universe, there is a multiverse traveler. Ancient, eldritch, deathless, incomprehensible to even other eldritch Lovecraftian beings. He can create and destroy galaxies and superclusters on a whim, kill ancient gods, break unbreakable binding contracts and is known to take human form. Humans always fascinated them with their complex natures. But now he hears of something that has evaded them for so long: a group of teenagers, its members always no older than 16, numbering in the quadrillions, calling themselves the Scarlet Suns, and their feats of heroism and justice, even if they were bloody and violent. They had no leaders, decentralized to a fault. They must meet them, perhaps new allies or even friends.

The eldritch being is intrigued by the Scarlet Suns and their mission to protect the multiverse. They have heard of their feats of heroism and justice, and they are fascinated by the idea of a group of teenagers working together to protect what matters most.

The being decides to take human form and travel to the universe where the Scarlet Suns reside. They are amazed by what they see. The Scarlet Suns are everywhere, working tirelessly to protect the multiverse from any threat.

The being approaches a group of Scarlet Suns members and introduces themselves. The teenagers are wary at first, but they soon realize that the being means them no harm.

The being is amazed by the Scarlet Suns' dedication and bravery. They have never seen anything like it before. They offer to help the Scarlet Suns in any way they can, and the teenagers accept.

Together, they embark on a mission to stop a group of interdimensional beings who seek to destroy the multiverse. The Scarlet Suns and the eldritch being work together, using their unique abilities to stop the threat.

As they succeed in their mission, the Scarlet Suns and the eldritch being realize that they make a great team. They continue to work together, protecting the multiverse from any threat that may arise.

The eldritch being is amazed by the Scarlet Suns' courage and determination. They have never seen anything like it before. They realize that even beings as powerful as themselves can learn from the Scarlet Suns and their mission to protect what matters most.

As they part ways, the eldritch being realizes that they have found something that they have been searching for for a long time: a group of teenagers who are not afraid to stand up for what is right, no matter the cost. And they feel grateful to have been a part of their mission, even if it was just for a brief moment.

In another universe, lives a normal human man and his four wives: a succubus demon from Hell, his guardian angel from Heaven, a ghost, neutral by nature and a Fae who doesn't abide by good/holy, neutral or evil/unholy leanings. Together he has four daughters, each half human and half of their mother. Simply put, a healthy, polygamous, polyamorous marriage.

In this universe, the man and his four wives live a happy and fulfilling life together. They have learned to navigate the challenges that come with their unique family dynamic and have found a way to make it work.

The succubus demon from Hell is fiercely loyal to her husband and her family. She uses her powers to protect them from any threat that may arise, and she is always there to offer comfort and support.

The guardian angel from Heaven is a beacon of light and hope for the family. She uses her powers to guide them on their path and to help them stay true to their values and beliefs.

The ghost is a quiet presence in the family, but she is always there to offer her wisdom and guidance. She has lived a long and fulfilling life, and she uses her experiences to help her family navigate the challenges of life.

The Fae is a wild and free spirit, but she is fiercely protective of her family. She uses her powers to defend them from any threat that may arise, and she is always there to offer her unique perspective on life.

Together, the man and his four wives have four daughters, each half human and half of their mother. They are a close-knit family, and they have learned to embrace their differences and celebrate their unique qualities.

In this universe, the man and his four wives have found a way to make their polygamous, polyamorous marriage work. They have learned to love and support each other, no matter what challenges may come their way. And they are grateful for the love and happiness that they have found together.

The man and his four supernatural wives enjoy a day off outside, with their four daughters. From a nice breakfast outside to water park fun. As they head home, an unusual person approaches them with curiosity, but no ill intent. The angel, demon, ghost and fae are familiar with them, an eldritch multiverse traveler in human form. They simply just want to talk, impressed how a human man managed to wed and father children with these four. This was interrupted by a group of teenagers appearing from a portal. How interesting. The Scarlet Suns. The man's four daughters are all 14, around the right age to join the Scarlet Suns. One of the Suns ask "Interested in these weirdos?" The being replies "Yes. Recruitment?" "Yup." "Well, carry on." The Suns talk to the four daughters as the being talks with the man and his wives. "Kids, can't be helped."

The man and his four wives are surprised by the appearance of the Scarlet Suns, but they are intrigued by their mission to protect the multiverse. They watch as the Suns approach their four daughters, who are all around the right age to join the group.

One of the Suns asks if the daughters are interested in joining, and the eldritch being in human form nods in agreement. The man and his wives watch as their daughters talk with the Scarlet Suns, impressed by their dedication and bravery.

As the conversation continues, the eldritch being in human form talks with the man and his wives. They are fascinated by the family's unique dynamic and the love and support that they have for each other.

The man and his wives explain how they have learned to navigate the challenges that come with their polygamous, polyamorous marriage, and how they have found a way to make it work.

The eldritch being nods in agreement, impressed by their dedication to each other and their family. They realize that even beings as powerful as themselves can learn from the love and support that the man and his wives have for each other.

As the conversation comes to an end, the Scarlet Suns and the man's daughters bid farewell and head back through the portal. The man and his wives watch as they disappear, feeling grateful for the experience.

The eldritch being in human form nods in agreement. "Kids, can't be helped," they say with a smile. And the man and his wives nod in agreement, feeling grateful for the love and support that they have for each other, no matter what challenges may come their way.

Four half-sisters, all 14 years of age, a human-angel hybrid, a human-demon hybrid, a human-ghost hybrid, and a human-fae hybrid are given black hoodies, black pants, red boots, red gloves, red belts and red panties meant to be worn on top of the pants, not as undergarments. The Scarlet Suns have gained four new members. While the man and his wives are happy for them, they're also concerned, something the eldritch being in human form doesn't seem to have, if anything more confidence than concern for the four.

The man and his wives watch as their four daughters are given the Scarlet Suns uniform, feeling a mix of happiness and concern. They know that the Scarlet Suns are a powerful force for good, but they also know that their daughters will be facing dangerous and potentially life-threatening situations.

The eldritch being in human form, however, seems to have no concern for the safety of the four half-sisters. They are confident in their abilities
